description_long: This armchair features a plush, teal-blue velvet upholstery with a soft, inviting appearance. The backrest is high and slightly winged, adorned with a diamond-tufted pattern and button accents, giving it a classic, elegant look. The armrests are wide, padded, and smoothly upholstered, providing ample comfort and support. The seat cushion is thick and appears removable, contributing to the chair's overall coziness. The legs are slender, slightly tapered, and made of light-colored wood, adding a touch of warmth and contrast to the design. The rear and sides of the chair display a subtle, wavy marbled pattern in the fabric, enhancing its visual interest.
description: A plush teal-blue velvet armchair with a high, diamond-tufted backrest, padded armrests, and slender wooden legs. The chair exudes comfort and elegance with its thick seat cushion and classic design details.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the padded armrest, thick seat cushion, and the marbled pattern on the side upholstery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the high, tufted backrest and the wavy marbled fabric pattern across the back.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the smooth, padded armrest and the continuation of the marbled upholstery pattern.
description_view_3: Front view showcasing the diamond-tufted high backrest, thick seat cushion, and both armrests.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and upholstered in teal velvet
attribute_backrest_style: high, slightly winged, diamond-tufted with button accents
attribute_upholstery_pattern: diamond-tufted velvet with wavy marbled side and back pattern
